note: Parallel rerank (--rerank-par) in the latency path, paired with query-threads=8. Parallelizing the C rescores cuts p50 ~10% and p99 ~16% (more at higher C, where rerank is a bigger slice). Combined stack (8-shard scan + parallel rerank): single-query p50 2.87ms vs 13ms single-thread baseline (021) = 4.5x. Modest because the scan, not rerank, dominates; the win is mostly tail (p99).
